desc: RefractV2 corner-lerp displacement model validated against headless t=0 flow. The exact-RNG field records + bilinear-phase-ramp (corner-lerp) displacement + a Size-independent Refraction gain reproduce FCP's measured flow. Confirms the decoded packing structure (NOT a plane-wave sum).
model: per octave A: c00=phA+axA*scale+ayA*px; c10=phA+axA*py+ayA*px; c01=phA+axA*scale+ayA*mm; c11=phA+axA*py+ayA*mm; argA(U,V)=bilerp(c00,c10,c01,c11;U,V)*2pi; offX+=sin(argA)*axA; offY+=sin(argA)*ayA; disp=gain*(offX,offY). U=x/W, V=y/H (approx; exact uses posx/sizeX+0.5 in the M-normalized frame).
findings: The Refraction gain (~47) is Size-INDEPENDENT (47.22 vs 47.08) -> confirms model generalizes.
Fitted 'scale' halves when Size doubles (0.21->0.11) -> scale ~ 1/Size (larger Size = lower spatial freq).
Ripple std halves when Size doubles (1.7->0.85) -> matches shader 1/sizeX coordinate scaling.
Spatial correlation 0.88-0.97 (not just DC) confirms the corner-lerp bilinear-phase-ramp form, disproving the plane-wave surrogate.

REMAINING: pin scale/px/py/mm to the exact M-matrix formulas (scale=Size*0.1 from const@0x268c50; px=M[0x460]/scale, py=M[0x438]/scale, mm=fneg) and the exact U=posx/sizeX+0.5 pixel mapping for a boot-free bit-exact port.

end_to_end.desc: node-boundary PSNR vs headless FCP at t=0 with FCT_UNDERWATER_EXACT (apply routes to underwaterApply): the wired exact path (exact-RNG field + corner-lerp displacement + inverse-map sign fix).
end_to_end.sign_fix: fieldOffsetExact disp matches FORWARD flow; the inverse-map resample negates it (fx=x-ox*g, fy=y-oy*g) -> +12 dB.
end_to_end.residual_to_40dB: validation-fitted kU/kV scalars (not yet exact M-projected) + bilinear resample; structure verified (corr 0.905-0.970).
